endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/byurl
endpoints.description: Gets a blog by url.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}
endpoints.description: Gets a blog by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/comments
endpoints.description: Lists comments by blog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages
endpoints.description: Lists pages.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages
endpoints.description: Inserts a page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}
endpoints.description: Gets a page by blog id and page id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}
endpoints.description: Updates a page by blog id and page id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a page by blog id and page id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}
endpoints.description: Patches a page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}/publish
endpoints.description: Publishes a page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}/revert
endpoints.description: Reverts a published or scheduled page to draft state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/pageviews
endpoints.description: Gets page views by blog id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts
endpoints.description: Lists posts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts
endpoints.description: Inserts a post.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/bypath
endpoints.description: Gets a post by path.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/search
endpoints.description: Searches for posts matching given query terms in the specified blog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Gets a post by blog id and post id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Updates a post by blog id and post id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a post by blog id and post id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Patches a post.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments
endpoints.description: Lists comments.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Gets a comment by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a comment by blog id, post id and comment id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}/approve
endpoints.description: Marks a comment as not spam by blog id, post id and comment id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}/removecontent
endpoints.description: Removes the content of a comment by blog id, post id and comment id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}/spam
endpoints.description: Marks a comment as spam by blog id, post id and comment id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/publish
endpoints.description: Publishes a post.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/revert
endpoints.description: Reverts a published or scheduled post to draft state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Gets one user by user_id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/users/{userId}/blogs
endpoints.description: Lists blogs by user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/users/{userId}/blogs/{blogId}
endpoints.description: Gets one blog and user info pair by blog id and user id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/users/{userId}/blogs/{blogId}/posts
endpoints.description: Lists post and user info pairs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/users/{userId}/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Gets one post and user info pair, by post_id and user_id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.
